title: Bucket
description: Bucket schema from Pure1 Public REST API

allOf.description: A built-in resource that exists on one or multiple arrays.

id.description: The opaque and unique id of this resource.

resource_type.description:
The type of this resource represented by the name of its REST endpoint.
For example, "arrays", "network-interfaces", and "metrics".
The value may be `null` if the resource is not represented.

created.description: Creation time of the bucket, in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

destroyed.description: Returns a value of `true` if the bucket is destroyed, but not yet eradicated.

object_count.description: The number of objects contained within the bucket.

versioning.description:
The versioning state for objects within the bucket.
Valid values are `none`, `enabled`, and `suspended`.
